texto: History is full of examples of regimes that were oppressing at home and aggressive abroad, and I can't think of too many liberal democracies engaging in counterfeiting, drug running, missile proliferation, and just about any other illegal activity you can think of as North Korea does.
explicacao: Citação de Ed Royce sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “History is full of examples of regimes that were oppressing at home and aggressive abroad, and I …” articula reflexao, home, think em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como estudos e viagem.
